scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -k -n worker,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w worker" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w worker && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w worker && npm run lint -w web
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w worker && npm run test -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w worker && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.emulators: npm run build -w shared && firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-verbo-test --non-interactive --only firestore "npm run test:rules -w worker"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build -w shared && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-verbo-test --non-interactive --only auth,firestore "node worker/scripts/e2e.mjs"
